law: This sample project uses two app targets to demonstrate how to use AccessorySetupKit.
simulates Bluetooth dice, while highlights how to use AccessorySetupKit to onboard the accessory.
The target uses AccessorySetupKit to authorize the use of a Bluetooth dice accessory and receive roll results.
The accessory is now authorized for use in the app.
Discover, select, and set up a specific Bluetooth accessory without requesting permission to use Bluetooth.
